text.title: Agent Rollback Button Design Examples
text.summary: One full worked example: rollback button for a customer-support agent.

example.title: Bundle inventory (step 1)
example.code: bundle_fields: - prompt_sha - schema_version - tool_registry_sha - model - eval_set_version - retrieval_index_version

example.title: Mutable/immutable partition (step 2)
example.code: immutable_fields: - conversations.messages # customer-authored text - conversations.metadata # routing tags written by humans - accounts.* # billing + identity - audit_log.* # ops history - feedback.scores # CSAT submissions

example.title: Eval gate (step 3)
example.note: Threshold = baseline (0.82) - ci_width (0.04) = 0.78. Anything below blocks the rollback target.

example.title: Audit-log entry emitted on rollback
example.code: { "ts": "2026-05-22T15:42:00Z", "who": "ruslan@faion.net", "from_bundle": "v3.2.0", "to_bundle": "v3.1.0", "eval_score_before": 0.71, "eval_score_after": 0.83, "reason": "p99 latency regression in v3.2.0 schema migration" }
